title: Sanji and Zeff’s Debt Comes to the Surface
scene: On pages 9–12, the Baratie conflict focuses on Luffy, Sanji, Don Krieg, Gin, Zeff. Sanji leaves the restaurant behind, joining Luffy’s crew while the cooks hide their emotions behind insults.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Woah, nice boat.

dialogue.speaker: Baratie cooks
dialogue.text: Can we really use this?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Of course. It's Sanji's after all.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You wanna take MORE!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Yup, gimme more meat.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: How many days are you gonna be sailin' for?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Dunno.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: sanji, let's say for example...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: No matter how villainous the scum, escaped convict, or whatnot...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: As long as they come here wanting to eat beyond all else...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Then doesn't that make all the hassle we go through to keep this place running,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: All the worthwhile?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Hey old geezer, this is amazing! So this is the restaurant on the seas!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That's right. Even all that treasure still wasn't enough to pay for this ship. So we'll be working overtime for awhile!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: It's fine since I'll be here to help!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Stop calling me a little eggplant, you damn geezer!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Did I hurt your feelings, lil' egg- plant?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Cough Cough Cough!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Stop smoking. Tobacco will dull your tongue.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I'm

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Heh heh... I'm all grown-up now, right!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Yooo! This the place that red- leg Zeff is supposedly running!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: You serious about this wanted ad about hiring *tuff cooks!?"

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: You wincompoop! You expect me to serve this crap to our guests!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: You can eat this instead!

dialogue.speaker: Baratie cooks
dialogue.text: Hey, did you hear? The owner of this place is a washed-up pirate.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Try sayin' that again, you punk!

dialogue.speaker: Baratie cooks
dialogue.text: Owner ZefF! Sanji beat up another customer again!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Stop Agitatin' My cooks, You Bastard!

dialogue.speaker: Baratie cooks
dialogue.text: We gotta stop owner ZefF!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Aghhh!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Alright, you damn cooks! If you fear for your lives,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Then hand over all your food!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What'd he say?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Not sure, I think I missed that!

summary: This part keeps the Baratie battle centered on willpower, debt, hunger, and pride. The dialogue shows who still stands firm after Krieg’s violence and who is ready to break away from the restaurant’s old life.
